name: vitally
description: Reads and writes Vitally customer-success accounts, users, notes, conversations, tasks, and NPS responses via the Vitally REST API.

risk.read: external Vitally API read of customer-success account/user/note/conversation/task/NPS-response data
risk.write: external mutation of Vitally customer-success records (create/update accounts, users, notes, tasks, conversations, NPS responses; delete notes and conversations); approval required
risk.approval: read: none, read-only sync surface. write: required for all mutating actions (create/update/delete of customer-success records visible to the vendor's CS team).
